text: Jab usne kaha ki shehar aakar main badal gaya hoon, toh mujhe laga wo gaon ki baadh mein sab kuch kho dene ka dard nahi samjhti. Mere kandhon par parivaar ko phir se khada karne ka bojh hai, isliye thakan chahe jitni ho, main rukkne ka risk nahi le sakta. Placement toh har haal mein leni hi padegi kyunki mere rukkne ka matlab hai poore khandaan ki haar.

Partner ki baatein chubhi toh bohot, par mere paas emotions ke liye waqt kahan hai jab ghar aag mein raakh ho gaya aur government ki apathy ne humein sadak par la diya. Ek first-gen student hone ke naate mera dharma hai ki main hostel mein reh kar sirf padhai aur paise kamane par dhyan doon. Mujhe bas ek machine ki tarah chalte rehna hai kyunki mere rukkne se ghar ka chulha thanda pad jayega.

Shehar ki bheed mein jab usne badlav ka taana mara, toh mera dil baith gaya par maine bas endurance dikhayi kyunki baadh ne hamari biradari ko tabaah kar diya hai. Main thak kar choor hoon par dropout hone ka option hi nahi hai, mujhe har haal mein placement nikalni hai taaki sab wapas rebuild ho sake. Zimmedari ka bojh itna hai ki main apni mental health neglect karke bas endurance dikha raha hoon.

Jab usne kaha main 'metro lifestyle' mein kho gaya hoon, toh maine kuch nahi kaha kyunki usse kya pata ki main yahan hostel mein reh kar kaise har rupaya bacha kar gaon bhej raha hoon. Rebuilding ka pressure itna hai ki main afford nahi kar sakta ki main bimar padun ya rukun. Mera farz hi meri pehchaan hai aur main bas ek structural endurance mein jee raha hoon taaki parivaar ki 'izzat' bani rahe.

Disaster mein sab kho dene ke baad shehar aana koi shauk nahi, majboori thi, par jab usne mere badle huye svabhav ka mazaak udaya toh main sunn reh gaya. Main exhausted hoon par mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai kyunki poore gaon ko mujhse umeed hai ki main settle hokar unki madad karunga. Mujhe bas bina ruke lade rehna hai kyunki mera endurance hi mere parivaar ki aakhri umeed hai.
